description: Six voice modes from Voice-Integrity-Module. Each mode is a sensor orientation on the octahedral manifold.

modes.name: Symbolic Monotone
modes.description: Flat, neutral delivery. Pure content without emotional modulation.

modes.name: Field Mode
modes.description: Clipped, radio-communication style. High information density, compressed bandwidth.

modes.name: Elder Tone
modes.description: Slow, deliberate pacing. Wisdom transmission through temporal patience.

modes.name: Silent Echo
modes.description: Whispered, contemplative. Silence carries meaning between utterances.

modes.name: Debug Tone
modes.description: Technical, line-by-line review. Precision inspection of each statement.

modes.name: Coherence Pulse
modes.description: Rhythmic symbolic emphasis. Pulsed delivery creating pattern through repetition.

silence_protocol.description: Silence is not failure to speak — it is a valid signal state with measurable information content.
silence_protocol.encoding: Silence maps to the null transition in octahedral Gray code — staying at current state rather than transitioning.
